title: Molator (Vindicator-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Vindicator''-class}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Molator''
(''Savrip'') |designer= |manufacturer=[[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] |line=[[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] |model=[[Vindicator-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Vindicator''-class]] |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} '''''Molator''''', originally known as '''''Savrip''''', was the first [[Vindicator-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Vindicator''-class]] vessel that was not converted into an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]]. It served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]], and patrolled the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] during the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. ''Savrip'' was later captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and renamed '''''Molator'''''. The Rebels used this cruiser as an armed diplomatic vessel, sending it throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] in search of more support for the Alliance. {{Ship-stub}} ==Sources== *''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' [[Category:Captured starships]] [[Category:Starships of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Vindicator-class heavy cruisers]]
